name: yopass
description: Secure sharing of secrets, passwords and files
readme_summary: Yopass is a tool for securely sharing secrets, passwords, and files. It utilizes end-to-end encryption in the browser, ensuring that the decryption key is never sent to the server. Secrets are one-time viewable and self-destruct after a set period, minimizing sensitive information exposure in insecure channels.
key_features: Secrets can only be viewed once
No accounts or user management required
Secrets self destruct after X hours
primary_use_case: Securely sharing sensitive information like passwords and secrets through a one-time, expiring link, accessible via a web interface or CLI.
cover_image_prompt: A minimalist, modern scene depicting a single, glowing, transparent digital envelope being passed from one hand to another. The envelope contains a swirling vortex of abstract data, but the key to unlock it is held separately by the sender, represented by a small, ephemeral, glowing key icon that is dissolving into light. The recipient's hand is reaching out, but cannot access the contents without the separate key. Subtle UI elements like a countdown timer and a 'view once' icon are visible on the envelope. The background is a clean, gradient blue, with the repository name 'Yopass' subtly integrated into the scene. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with soft lighting and a focus on conveying secure, ephemeral transfer.

name: ffmpeg-over-ip
readme_summary: ffmpeg-over-ip is a Go-based solution that allows applications to leverage GPU-accelerated FFmpeg transcoding on remote servers without requiring direct GPU access, complex setups like PCIe passthrough, or shared filesystems. It acts as a proxy, forwarding FFmpeg commands and file I/O over a TCP connection to a server running a patched FFmpeg instance.
key_features: No GPU passthrough or shared filesystems required
Client/server architecture over a single TCP port
Pre-built FFmpeg/ffprobe binaries with broad hardware acceleration support (NVENC, QSV, VAAPI, etc.)
Support for multiple clients connecting to a single server
primary_use_case: Enabling media servers (like Jellyfin or Emby) or other applications to utilize powerful remote GPU transcoding resources without complex infrastructure changes.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan in a workshop, holding a rough block of raw material (representing local files) and a glowing, powerful GPU chip. The artisan uses a magical conduit, a shimmering TCP stream, to channel the essence of the raw material directly into the GPU. The GPU then expertly sculpts the material into a polished, high-definition video stream, which flows back through the conduit to the artisan. Subtle UI elements showing FFmpeg commands and data flow are visible on small screens in the background. The overall scene is clean, focused, and uses a warm, inviting color palette, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style.

name: navi
description: An interactive cheatsheet tool for the command-line
readme_summary: Navi is an interactive cheatsheet tool for the command-line that helps users discover and execute commands. It integrates with fuzzy finders like fzf or skim to provide dynamic suggestions for command arguments, reducing the need to memorize complex CLI syntax.
primary_use_case: To provide an interactive and discoverable way for users to find and execute command-line commands, especially complex ones, by offering dynamic suggestions and a searchable cheatsheet interface.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, knowledgeable librarian character in a cozy, digital library. The librarian is holding an open book that glows with command-line interfaces and code snippets. Around the librarian, floating orbs of light represent different commands, with one orb being selected and its arguments dynamically appearing as glowing text in the air. The background subtly features a command-line terminal interface. The overall mood is helpful and empowering, suggesting ease of access to complex information. The style should be a warm, inviting 3D illustration with soft lighting and clear, readable text elements.

name: lama-loca
description: 📚 Lama Loca — локальный ИИ-ассистент для учёбы. Учится по вашим книгам, создаёт отчёты, презентации, конспекты. Полностью офлайн.
readme_summary: Lama Loca is an offline AI study assistant that learns from your personal documents (PDF, EPUB, DOCX, etc.) to generate reports, presentations, summaries, and answer questions. It processes your data locally, ensuring privacy and security.
key_features: Chat with your books for real-time answers
Prepare for exams with definitions and Q&A
primary_use_case: An AI-powered personal study assistant that processes user-provided documents to generate various academic outputs and answer questions, all while operating completely offline.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, friendly owl wearing spectacles, perched on a stack of diverse books (PDF, EPUB, DOCX icons subtly visible). The owl is actively 'reading' the books, with glowing digital threads connecting its eyes to the pages. From its beak, it's smoothly weaving intricate, colorful ribbons representing different academic outputs: a scroll for reports, a miniature presentation slide, and a neatly organized notepad for notes. The background is a cozy, dimly lit study, with subtle UI elements and code snippets floating gently around. The repository name 'Lama Loca' is subtly etched on one of the books. Style: 3D isometric illustration, warm and inviting color palette, clear visual storytelling.

name: IxeRam
readme_summary: IxeRam is a high-performance, terminal-native memory scanner and debugger for Linux, offering a "Cheat Engine-like" experience. It focuses on speed, low overhead, and integration with tools like Ghidra, utilizing advanced techniques for direct memory access and live patching.
key_features: Advanced Memory Scanner (Int8/16/32/64, Float, Double, Strings, AOB, wildcards, multi-threaded, real-time tracking)
primary_use_case: Debugging and reverse engineering applications on Linux directly from the terminal, especially for performance-critical tasks or remote SSH environments.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled mechanic, illuminated by the glow of a terminal screen, is inside the intricate clockwork mechanism of a large, complex machine. They are using specialized tools that resemble code snippets and data streams to precisely adjust gears and springs (representing memory addresses and values). Small, glowing red and blue indicators show values changing, while a subtle overlay of assembly code and data structures floats around the mechanic. The overall mood is focused and precise, with a clean, digital art style emphasizing the intricate internal workings of the machine. The repository name 'IxeRam' is subtly etched onto one of the tools.

name: GEO-AI-Woo
description: AI Search Optimization for WordPress and WooCommerce.  Generate llms.txt, AI crawler rules and metadata to make your site visible to AI search engines.
readme_summary: GEO AI Woo is a WordPress plugin designed to optimize websites, particularly WooCommerce stores, for AI search engines and Large Language Models (LLMs). It automatically generates essential files like `llms.txt` and `llms-full.txt`, along with AI-specific metadata and crawler rules, to enhance content visibility and structure for AI crawlers.
key_features: Generates `/llms.txt` and `/llms.full.txt` for AI crawler visibility
Adds AI-specific metadata (AI Description, AI Keywords, Exclude from AI)
Supports a wide range of AI bots including GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Gemini, PerplexityBot, and more
Integrates with the broader GEO AI ecosystem for multi-platform AI search optimization
Provides fallback mechanisms for filesystem write issues
primary_use_case: To make WordPress and WooCommerce websites discoverable and understandable by AI search engines and LLMs through automated generation of SEO-optimized content and configuration files.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot librarian diligently organizing a vast library of digital books. Each book represents a piece of website content. The robot is placing special, glowing index cards (representing `llms.txt` and metadata) onto each book, making them easily accessible. In the background, abstract streams of data flow towards the library, symbolizing AI crawlers efficiently finding and understanding the organized information. Subtle UI elements showing keywords and descriptions are visible on the index cards. The overall scene is bright, clean, and futuristic, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clarity and organization.
